chapters.title: The Bell and the Token
chapters.llmPrompt: Create a cinematic fantasy digital painting, atmospheric dawn wide shot. Viewer-protagonist kneeling on wet moss in an ancient fog-heavy forest, holding a warm copper token engraved with a crescent moon. Add drifting mist layers, dew on ferns, distant bell silhouette, and subtle tension in the lighting. Mood: mysterious adventure with quiet dread, no ending spoilers, no text, no watermark.

chapters.title: The River Crossing

To the left, a river-grey ferryman stands motionless in a moored flat-bottomed boat, notched bone oar along the hull, eyes already fixed on a copper crescent token in the protagonist's fist with unmistakable recognition. Mood: a decision felt before it is named, quiet recognition across dark water, two paths offering themselves in very different languages, no ending spoilers, no text, no watermark.
